scripts.check: npm run check:tailwind-cdn && node scripts/validate-site.js && node scripts/audit-third-party.js && node scripts/check-generated.js
scripts.sync:ext-engine: node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.mkdirSync('scraper/extension/engine',{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync('scraper/engine'))fs.copyFileSync('scraper/engine/'+f,'scraper/extension/engine/'+f);console.log('engine copied to extension')"
scripts.sync:all: npm run sync:html-head && npm run build:tailwind && npm run build:manifest && npm run build:site-assets && npm run sync:readme
